chin_falam.soft_landing_desc: Kum 3+ chungah: ṭhannak 2–4%, man sannak 1–3%, rian ngeih lonak <5%
chin_falam.logged_3_policy_mixes: Phunglam chawhnak 3+ Phunglam Holhchiannak ah na ttial
chin_falam.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Innchungkhar nih thil le rian ah an hmanmi tangka. GDP chungah a ngan bik mi a si.
chin_falam.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Sumdawr nih hnathlak thil, inn thar sernak, le a khonhmi thil lengmangnak ah a hmanmi tangka.
chin_falam.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Cozah nih thil le rian ah a hmanmi tangka (Social Security bantuk pekmi tangka cu a tel lo).
chin_falam.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: A leng thawn chuahmi cu a chungah luhmi in hlonh. Atu ah America caah a niam (sumdawr niamnak).
chin_falam.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: GDP taktak chungah zacheu lengmangnak. 2-3% cu ṭha a si.
chin_falam.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Man lengmangnak lakchung kha a tah. Man sannak tahnak a ngan bik mi a si.
chin_falam.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Rian a ngei lomi riantuantu zacheu. A hmaanmi zat cu ~4% a si.
chin_falam.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Bank pawl nih pakhat le pakhat an i lakmi puh man. Fed nih a hman bik mi hnathlak a si.
chin_falam.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: America kampani ngan 500 nambat. Ṭhenmi dawr dinhmun a langhtertu a si.
chin_falam.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Thil cawktu pawl nih sum le pai kong ah zeitindah an ruat ti hnik-halnak.
chin_falam.number_of_new_residential_construction: Inn thar sernak rian thawkmi nambat.
chin_falam.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: A leng thawn chuahmi cu a chungah luhmi in hlonh. Tamchapnak = a sang, niamnak = a niam.
chin_falam.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Cozah nih a puhmi vialte. America leiba cu ~$34 trillion a si (2024).
chin_falam.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Puh man le bond a hminmi caan kha a langhter. A i lehpiak ahcun = tlaknak a rat lai timi hmelchunhnak.
chin_falam.survey_of_manufacturing_activity_50_ex: Thil sernak rian hnik-halnak. >50 = a ṭhang, <50 = a niam.
chin_falam.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Mi karlak tangka i tluk lonak a tah. 0 = a i tluk dih, 1 = i tluk lonak a ngan bik.
chin_falam.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Tangka timhtuahnak lam a fawi bik le mi tampi nih an hmanmi.
chin_falam.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Thil dang zeihmanh na hman HLAN ah zacheu khiahmi kha khon.
chin_falam.zero_based_budget: Zero ah a Dihmi Tangka Timhtuahnak
chin_falam.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Dollar pakhat cio nih rian a ngeih. Luhmi tangka in hmanmi hlonh = zero taktak.
chin_falam.what_should_you_do_first: Zeidah HMASA BIK in na tuah awk a si?
chin_falam.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Zeicah dah sithau duhnak cu na ruah bantuk in a niam lo?
chin_falam.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Zeicah dah puh man sannak nih ṭhenmi man a hrawh?
chin_falam.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Ram zeidah kompiuta lei ah tahchunhnak ṭhatnak a ngeih?
chin_falam.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Caan saupi ah zeidah a chuak lai a si ngai?
chin_falam.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Sianginn sang cawnnak a man TAKTAK cu zeidah a si?
chin_falam.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: 2021-2022 ah sum le pai lei ah zei a chuak?
chin_falam.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Sithau zuarnak a dang nih zeidah a tuah lai?
chin_falam.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Hi hi dawr hlawhlohnak phun zeidah a si?
chin_falam.how_much_should_you_contribute_at_mini: A tlawm bik ah zeizat dah na chiah awk a si?
chin_falam.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Man a sang → duhnak a tlawm, pekmi a tam. Man a niam → duhnak a tam, pekmi a tlawm. Aa remnak: S le D an i tonnak hmun.
chin_falam.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M). Thil Hmannak + Tangka Chiahnak + Cozah + A Leng Thawn Chuahmi Sunglawi. Ram chuahmi vialte a tah.
chin_falam.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Duhnak-hnennak: tangka a tam tuk in thil tlawm a hlen. Man-nawhnak: thil sernak man a sang. A chungah a ummi: hlawh le man cu an sang zungzal lai timi ruahchannak.
chin_falam.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Puh man (FFR) • Dawr ah bond cawk le zuar • Bank khonh awk tangka • Puhnak tukverh • Hmailei hruaihnak bia
chin_falam.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Cai phunglam = Congress (cai/hmannak). Tangka phunglam = Fed (puh man/tangka pekmi). Pahnih hna nih sum le pai kha lam phundang in an nghawng.
chin_falam.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: Na tangka pahnih a cannak kum zeizat dah a herh ti hngalh awkah 72 kha puh man he ṭhen. 72 ÷ 8% = pahnih a can nakhnga kum 9.
chin_falam.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Nem (>1): a herh ngai lomi, a aihnak a um. Khauh (<1): a herh ngaimi, a aihnak a um lo. Aa tluk (=1): P chungah % lengmangnak = Q chungah % lengmangnak.
chin_falam.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Tlangzarhnak Tlingtlai → Thil Phundang he Tlangzarhnak → Zuartu Tlawmte Lawng → Zuartu Pakhat Lawng. Dawr chungah thiltikhawhnak a ngan deuh = man a sang deuh, rian ṭhatnak a tlawm deuh.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Pekmi le duhnak milem nih duhnak, pekmi, aa remnak man, aa remnak zat, tamchapnak, tlawmnak, le cai nghawngnak kha a langhter.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_shortage: Man sang khiahnak a ṭuan: tlawmnak hrekah
chin_falam.canvas_summary_surplus: Man niam khiahnak a ṭuan: tamchapnak hrekah
chin_falam.canvas_summary_tax_2: nih sumdawr kha hrekah hi tiang a tlawmter
chin_falam.canvas_probe_hint: Milem kha hmeh — asiloah a cungah chiah law arrow tuahnak kha hmang — zat zeizat paoh ah cawktu caah a man le sertu caah a man kha na hlathlai khawh nakhnga.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Namah tangka milem nih thla khat tangka timhtuahnak chakuang milem le puh man chapchap in ṭhannak ruahchannak kha a langhter.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_stock_market: Ṭhenmi dawr milem nih na thimmi kampani man tuanbia, ṭhenmi pumkhat chungah tangka, na ngeihmi ṭhenmi, le atu man kha a langhter.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Ṭhenmi dawr milem hmun cu dawr thar caah a i timh cang. Man tuanbia le na ngeihmi ṭhenmi hmuh awkah dawr entelnak thawk.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_business: Sumdawr zohkhenhnak nih tangka, minthannak, pum khat man le hlawknak, man aa tlaknak hmun, le nifate hlawknak tuanbia kha a langhter.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_business_empty: Sumdawr zohkhenhnak hmun a hoi rih. Tangka, minthannak, le nifate hlawknak hikah hmuh awkah a tang ah sumdawr thawk.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_macro: Ram sum le pai zohkhenhnak nih GDP ṭhannak, man sannak, puh man, rian ngeih lonak, sumdawr aa remnak, le phunglam tuanbia kha a langhter.
chin_falam.canvas_summary_inquiry: Phunglam holhchiannak nih makro chuahmi entelnak sernak caah phunglam hnenhnak pali a hmang. GDP, man sannak, le rian ngeih lonak lengmangnak tahchunh awkah a tang i phunglam bar kha hmang.
chin_falam.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Siangngakchia pawl kha hnenhnak an hnen hlan ah man, zat, tamchapnak, asiloah tlawmnak dah a lengmang lai ti kha ruah hmasa awk in hal hna.
chin_falam.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Siangngakchia pawl kha tangka timhtuahnak chungah hlonh a hau mi pakhat le puh man chapchap nih hmasa in thawknak a ṭhatpiakmi ruangbia pakhat kha chim awk in hal hna.
chin_falam.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Siangngakchia pawl kha chimhnak pakhat chungah man lengmangnak, sumdawr a bunghmun, le ṭhenmi pumkhat ṭihnungnak kha ṭhen awk in hal hna.
chin_falam.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Siangngakchia pawl kha sumdawr an ṭhen hlan ah man aa tlaknak hmun phak awkah hnaicu zeizat dah zuar a herh ti kha ruah awk in hal hna.
chin_falam.teacher_prompt_macro: Siangngakchia pawl kha phunglam tinhmi pakhat thim law a ṭhatnak asiloah a ṭhatlonak a langhtertu tahnak kha langhter awk in hal hna.
chin_falam.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Siangngakchia pawl kha sum le pai thiam pawl nih phunglam hnenhnak zeidah an i lehpiak taktak ti hal hna law, hi entelnak hi cawnpiaknak lam lawng a si ti kha chimter hna.
chin_falam.literacy_tooltip: Sum le pai hngalhnak cu ruahnak cawnmi, entelnak chungah kum na kalmi, sittatnak dik zat, le na hmuhmi thil he ṭhan a si
chin_falam.topic_tabs: Sum le Pai Cawnnak Hmun biatlangte
chin_falam.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Pekmi le Duhnak — man hmuhnak lam
chin_falam.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Duhnak kawi cu a tang lam ah a ip (a man tlawm = tam deuh in cawk); pekmi kawi cu a cung lam ah a ip (a man sang = tam deuh in ser). Aa remnak man le zat cu an i tonnak hmun a si. Adam Smith nih 1776 ah a ṭialmi Wealth of Nations cu a bunghmun a si rih.
chin_falam.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: herhmi / duhmi / khonhnak. Puh man chapchap cu khuaruahhar pariat-nak a si; kum 30 hmasa in 7% he thawk ahcun $1 cu $7.61 a cang. Puhnak kad kha a dihlak in pe — 19% APR cu mifir man bantuk a si.
chin_falam.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Ṭhenmi Dawr — kampani ṭhen tete ngeihnak
chin_falam.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Ṭhenmi pakhat cawk = kampani ṭhen pakhat na ngeih ti a si. S&P 500 cu kum 100 chungah kum khat ah ~10% hlawknak lakchung a pe. Hmun tampi ah ṭhen (kampani pakhat lawngah chiah hlah), caan saupi hrial (dawr chungah caan saupi um cu caan ṭha hlei hlathlai nak in a ṭha deuh).
chin_falam.business_sim_you_re_the_founder: Sumdawr Entelnak — nangmah cu a thawktu na si
chin_falam.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Luhmi tangka − man = hlawknak. Man aa tlaknak hmun cu a lengmang lomi man vialte a i pehmi hmun a si. Sumdawr te tampi cu kum 5-nak ah an tluk; a luatmi hna nih dawr nih a duhmi thil kha an hmuh. Cawktu hmuhnak man (CAC) le cawktu nih a nunnak chungah a pekmi man (LTV) cu a thawktu nih nifate a ruahmi nambat a si.
chin_falam.national_economy_gdp_inflation_unemplo: Ram Sum le Pai — GDP, man sannak, rian ngeih lonak
chin_falam.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP nih chuahmi vialte a tah; CPI nih man sannak a tah; U-3 rian ngeih lonak cu a ngan bik mi zat a si. Fed nih ṭhannak le man sannak aa remter awkah puh man a khiah — mah cu Congress nih 1977 ah a pekmi rian pahnih a si.
chin_falam.policy_inquiry_hero: Phunglam Holhchiannak — lehnak a um lo
chin_falam.policy_inquiry_hero_hint: Hnenhnak kha hnen, makro dinhmun kha NA RELH HLAN ah ruah hmasa, cun na ruahnak kha chim. Sum le pai thiam taktak pawl zong nih hi hmelchunhnak le a ngan zat kong ah an i lehpiak ngaingai.
chin_falam.try_supply_demand: Tuah tho: Man Sang Khiahnak kha $30 ah chiah (inn man khiahnak). Hmasa in ruah — pum zeizat dah dawr ah a tlawm lai?
chin_falam.try_personal_finance: Tuah tho: Balanced ah 15% chiah law Innkhat Ummi inn kha thim. Kum 5 chung ah ngeihmi man le tangka kha zoh.
chin_falam.try_stock_market: Tuah tho: ni 5 chung sumdawr tuah, cun na hlawknak kha cawk-law-hrialmi Index (hrial) he tahchunh. Ahodah a tei?
chin_falam.try_entrepreneur: Tuah tho: na ṭhen hlan ah man aa tlaknak hmun kha hmu, cun ni khat chung man 50% sang deuh in tuah tho. Hlawknak ah zei a chuak?
chin_falam.try_macro: Tuah tho: na tinhmi ah "Man sannak dai ter" kha thim, puh man kha point 2 sangter, cun kum khat hmailei ah kal.
chin_falam.try_inquiry: Tuah tho: hnenhnak a tlawm bik na hman khawhnak he dirnak le man sannak (man sannak sang + GDP a tlak) kha chuahter.
chin_falam.glossary_copied: Biafang hlathlainak kha kopi a si cang — na cattial ah chiah
chin_falam.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Sum le pai ruahnak hmuh awkah entelnak kha hmang! A chuakmi thil pakhat cio nih ruahnak thar an cawnpiak i hikah an chap.
chin_falam.quiz_failed_offline_hint: Sittatnak sernak a hlawhlo — zohnak hmun i Zuamnak entelnak kha tuah tho (internet ngei loin an ṭuan)
chin_falam.ask_any_economics_question: Sum le pai biahalnak zeipaoh hal...
chin_falam.scenario_complete: 🏁 Biahalnak vialte na leh dih cang!
chin_falam.scenario_complete_2: a dik, a ṭha bik zulhzat
chin_falam.scenario_complete_3: . Entelnak cu an i chang ṭhan — na zulhzat kha na tei khawh maw?
chin_falam.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Man sannak nih caan a kal lawngin cawk khawhnak kha zeitindah a hrawh ti zoh. Nihin dollar khat cu thaizing dollar khat nak in a man a sang deuh!
chin_falam.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Sum le pai cu ṭhannak le niamnak kulhnak a i chang ṭhanmi chungah a kal. Kulhnak chungah khoika ah dah kan um ti hngalh cu a dawtmi zei a rat lai ti ruah khawhnak a bawmh.
chin_falam.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: "Puh man chapchap cu vawlei khuaruahhar pariat-nak a si." — Albert Einstein (a chimmi an ti)
chin_falam.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Sum le pai thiam pawl cu an i lehpiak! Ruahnak bu phundang nih biahalnak pakhat ah lehnak phundang an pek. Hi ruahnak hna hngalhnak nih sum le pai phunglam kha fim tein ruah khawh nakhnga an in bawmh.
chin_falam.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Dawr cu tlangzarhnak tlingtlai (zuartu tampi, thil aa lomi) in zuartu pakhat lawng (zuartu pakhat, thil a dangmi) tiang a um. Tam deuh cawn awkah pakhat cio hmeh:
chin_falam.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Gross Domestic Product nih ram khat chung ah kum khat chungah an sermi thil le rian dihlak man kha a tah. America ah hitin a i ṭhen:
chin_falam.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Man ↑ ahcun, duhmi zat ↓. Man a sang tikah mi nih tlawm deuh in an cawk. Duhnak kawi cu a tang lam ah a ip.
chin_falam.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Man ↑ ahcun, pekmi zat ↑. Man a sang tikah sertu nih tam deuh an ser. Pekmi kawi cu a cung lam ah a ip.
chin_falam.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Pekmi le duhnak an i tonnak hmun. Hi "E" hmun nih dawr man (P*) le zat (Q*) kha amah te in a khiah.
chin_falam.shifts_vs_movements: Kawi Lengmangnak le Kawi Cungah Kalnak:
chin_falam.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Man lengh cu kawi CUNGAH kalnak a si. A leng thil (theknoloji, tangka luhmi, duhnak) nih kawi dihlak kha A LENGHTER.
chin_falam.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Duhnak cu ORLEI ah a leng — Mi tam deuh nih hi thil hi an duh (tangka luhmi a sang, asiloah a minthang cang). Hi nih aa remnak man LE zat pahnih hna kha a sangter.
chin_falam.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Duhnak cu VEILEI ah a leng — Mi tlawm deuh nih hi thil hi an duh (a aihnak thil a man tlawm cang, asiloah mi duhnak a lengh). Man LE zat pahnih hna kha a niam.
chin_falam.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Pekmi cu ORLEI ah a leng — Sertu nih man tlawm deuh in tam deuh an ser khawh (theknoloji thar, thil hman man a niam). Man a niam, sihmanhsehlaw zat a sang.
chin_falam.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Pekmi cu VEILEI ah a leng — Sernak a har cang (khuachia, phunglam thar). Man a sang, sihmanhsehlaw zat a niam.
chin_falam.demand_flatter: — a phai deuh, NEM deuh: cawktu nih man lengmangnak kha fak tein an leh (a herh ngai lomi, a aihnak a ummi thil).
chin_falam.demand_steeper: — a dir deuh, KHAUH deuh: man a lengh tikah cawktu nih zat an lengh deuh lo (sithau asiloah sii bantuk a herh ngaimi thil).
chin_falam.supply_flatter: — a phai deuh, NEM deuh: sertu nih sernak kha fawi tein an sangter asiloah an niamter khawh (sehlengin sermi thil).
chin_falam.supply_steeper: — a dir deuh, KHAUH deuh: chuahmi zat kha khulrang tein lengh a har (inn, lo, hlaperh ṭhutdan).
chin_falam.tax_incidence_1: — cawktu nih a pekmi le zuartu nih a lakmi karlak ah "cai karlak" a i onh i, pahnih dirhmun caah a ṭhami sumdawr cheukhat cu an chuak ti lo (A HLAWHLOMI SUNNAK). Atu ah cawktu nih hrekah ~
chin_falam.tax_incidence_2: % an phorh i zuartu nih hrekah ~
chin_falam.tax_incidence_3: % an phorh — A KHAUH deuhmi lei (a dir deuhmi) nih zeitikhmanh ah a tam deuh a phorh. Nemnak hnenhnak kha lengh law ṭhennak a lengh dan kha zoh.
chin_falam.slope_note: 📚 A phai = nem: mi nih man kha fak tein an leh (a herh ngai lomi, a aihnak a ummi). A dir = khauh: an ziaza kha fawi tein an lengh kho lo (sithau, sii). Kawi na lengh tikah cai ahodah a phorh ti kha zoh.
chin_falam.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: nih man a lengh tikah duhmi zat zeitluk dah a lengh ti kha a tah.
chin_falam.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: thil (a herh ngai lomi thil, a aihnak a ummi thil) cu man tlawmte a sang tikah duhnak a ngan tein a niam.
chin_falam.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: thil (sii, sithau bantuk a herh ngaimi thil) cu man zeitin a si hmanh ah duhnak a lengh lo.
chin_falam.luxury_goods_restaurants_vacations: A herh ngai lomi thil, rawlei inn, cawlhnak kalnak
chin_falam.revenue_unchanged_by_price: Luhmi tangka cu man ruangah a lengh lo
chin_falam.cash_flow_warning: ⚠️ Na tangka cu zero tang ah a um — na hmuhmi nak in tam deuh na hmang. Inn man tlawm deuh tuah tho, tangka chiahnak % kha niamter, asiloah a chapchap hlan ah leiba kha pe.
chin_falam.months_of_expenses: thla zat hman khawhmi tangka kut chungah
chin_falam.emergency_fund_target: ruahnak petu pawl nih thla 3–6 khonh awk an ti
chin_falam.flow_invested: Tangka chiahnak ah a kal (nangmah ta a si rih!)
chin_falam.flow_footnote: * kut chung tangka a si lo — ṭhannak cu na ṭhenmi pumkhat chungah a chap; puh man cu na leiba chungah a chap.
chin_falam.lower_monthly_cost_flexibility: Thla khat man a niam deuh, a lengmang khawh
chin_falam.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Rochan na ser, sihmanhsehlaw inn leiba + siarnak a um
chin_falam.cheapest_option_save_more: A man tlawm bik, tam deuh na khon khawh
chin_falam.investment_allocation_of_annual_salary: 📊 Tangka Chiahnak Ṭhennak (kum khat hlawh chungin % chiahmi)
chin_falam.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Dawr phun zeidah na sumdawrnak duh ti kha chim. AI nih tangka dinhmun taktak bantuk a ngeimi kampani ruahmi 5 a ser lai.
chin_falam.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: tahchunhnak: "thazang thar kampani thar", "lentecelhnak kampani", "vancung rian", asiloah aa chawhmi duh ahcun a hoi in chiah...
chin_falam.index_lesson: 📚 Cawk-law-hrialmi index nih na sumdawrnak a tei. Zungzal in sumdawr a tuahmi mi tampi cu vialte hrial lawng nak in an ttha lo — cucaah index fund cu ruahnak petu pawl nih an chimh bikmi a si.
chin_falam.concentration_warning: ⚠️ Na ṭhenmi man 70% nakin tam cu kampani pakhat lawngah a um. Hmun tampi ah ṭhennak nih kampani pakhat a tluk tikah a in venhim — na tangka kha ṭhen.
chin_falam.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Dawr Thar in Tan & Kampani Thar Ser
chin_falam.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Sumdawr ruahnak zeipaoh ṭial law AI nih thawknak man, nifate man, le zuarnak man a ser lai. Cun nifate in ṭuanter!
chin_falam.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: tahchunhnak: rawl mawṭaw, uico kalpi, cawnpiaknak, changreu inn, app sernak...
chin_falam.biz_cash_warning: ⚠️ Na sumdawr nih tangka a sun — tangka cu zero tang ah a um. Pum khat man le hlawknak kha check: zuarnak man nih pum khat sernak man LE a lengmang lomi man ṭhen kha a i pehmi maw? Man sangter, man tlawmter, asiloah minthannak ser — mah hna cu na hnenhnak an si.
chin_falam.below_cost_warning: ⚠️ Man cu pum khat sernak man nak in a niam — zuarnak PAKHAT CIO ah tangka na sun.
chin_falam.high_price_hint: 📚 Man cu chimhmi nak in a sang tuk — duhnak a niam lai ti ruahchan (man nemnak).
chin_falam.shock_oil_lesson: Pekmi lam ruahlopi thil nih man a sangter I chuahmi zong a tlawmter — 1973 OPEC khamhnak bantuk in dirnak le man sannak a chuahter.
chin_falam.shock_tech_lesson: Chuahmi ṭhannak cu a tlawmte a chuakmi rawl-man-lo a si: riantuantu pakhat nih tam deuh a ser ahcun GDP a sang i man sannak a chuahter lo.
chin_falam.shock_financial_lesson: Puhnak a har tikah duhnak a thi: GDP, man, le rian ngeihnak vialte an tlak ṭi, 2008 bantuk in.
chin_falam.shock_trade_war_lesson: A leng in luhmi thil cai nih ram chungah man a sangter i, a leng ah thil a thawn chuahtu pawl cungah lehrulhnak a chuahter.
chin_falam.shock_consumer_boom_lesson: Ruahchannak nih sum le pai a hnen: innchungkhar nih him an i tih tikah tangka an hmang i, mi pakhat hmanmi tangka cu mi dang luhmi tangka a si.
chin_falam.report_spend_up_2: % GDP nih duhnak a chapter (Keynes tamter dan) — sihmanhsehlaw leiba cu a dawtah pek a herh.
chin_falam.report_spend_down_2: % GDP, hi nih sum le pai chungin duhnak a lakpiak.
chin_falam.report_tax_up_2: % nih innchungkhar hna kha hman awk tangka tlawm deuh a chiahpiak, cucaah duhnak a dai.
chin_falam.report_tax_down_2: % nih innchungkhar hna kha hman awk tangka tam deuh a chiahpiak, cucaah duhnak a sang.
chin_falam.report_rate_high: 🏦 Puh man cu lakchung ~3% nak in a sang ruangah puhnak a man cang — tangka chiahnak le riantuantu lak cu an nual (tangka khamhnak).
chin_falam.report_rate_low: 🏦 Puh man cu lakchung nak in a niam ruangah puhnak a fawi cang — puhnak nih a chuahtermi duhnak a sang (tangka nawhnak).
chin_falam.report_okun_2: % cu ~2% lam he tahchunh ahcun rian ngeih lonak kha hitiang ah a leng
chin_falam.goal_missed_inflation: (a palh lam ah a leng — hnenhnak zeidah puhnak man a sangter?)
chin_falam.goal_missed_growth: (zeidah duhnak a chapter — hmannak, cai tlawmternak, asiloah puhnak a fawimi?)
chin_falam.goal_missed_unemployment: (Okun phunglam: ṭhannak nih ~2% lam a tei tikah rian ngeih lonak a niam)
chin_falam.policy_goal_label: 🎯 Phunglam tinhmi (pakhat thim, ruah, cun hmailei ah kal):
chin_falam.real_rate_note: 📚 Man taktak = a ṭialmi − man sannak =
chin_falam.real_rate_negative: Man taktak cu zero tang a si ahcun a puhtu nih an tei i a khontu nih an sun — hi nih sum le pai a forh ngai.
chin_falam.real_rate_positive: Man taktak a sang ahcun khonhnak caah laksawng a si i puhnak a nualter — hi nih a khamh.
chin_falam.deficit_note: 📚 Cai tlawm deuh lak law tangka tam deuh hman = leiba he hmannak. Atu ah a forh, sihmanhsehlaw leiba cu hmailei cai petu pawl cungah a tlami phorhrit a si.
chin_falam.economy_reset: ♻ Sum le pai cu 2025 bunghmun ah tan a si cang
chin_falam.reset_economy: ♻ Sum le Pai Thar in Tan
chin_falam.macro_model_disclaimer: Hi cu cauk chung Keynes hmelchunhnak le Okun phunglam rian ngeih lonak he entelnak lawng a si — HMAILEI CHIMCHUNGNAK A SI LO. Sum le pai taktak cu ruahchannak, zumhnak, le vawlei dinhmun cungah a hngat i, sum le pai thiam pawl zong nih hi nambat hna kong ah an i lehpiak ngaingai (zohnak hmun i Ruahnak Bu kha zoh).
chin_falam.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP a niam. Rian ngeih lonak a sang. Duhnak dihlak a tlai lo.
chin_falam.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: A chuak ttheu lo i a ṭha lo: man sannak a sang + ṭhannak a tlawm. 1970 kum OPEC ruahlopi bantuk. Siarnak a har.
chin_falam.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Ṭhannak a ṭha nain man sannak a sang tuk. Bank lentlai nih fak tein a khamh lai a si.
chin_falam.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP a sang, man sannak kha a khamh khawh. Goldilocks hmun — atu caah a kal peng khawh.
chin_falam.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Nghawngnak a tlawm. Phunglam hnenhnak hna cu an i thuah ṭi.
chin_falam.policy_inquiry_predict_the_macro_outco: 🔬 Phunglam Holhchiannak — Makro Chuahmi Ruah Hmasa
chin_falam.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Phunglam hnenhnak pali (cai, cozah hmannak, puh man, a leng thil cai) kha hnen. Na relh hlan ah makro dinhmun kha ruah hmasa. Nambat a um lo, lehnak langhter a um lo.
chin_falam.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Na ruahnak (nunnak taktak ah sum le pai thiam pawl nih hnenhnak zeidah an i lehpiak bik? Zeicah?)
chin_falam.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: tahchunhnak: a leng thil cai nih man kha khulrang tein a hrawh nain GDP nghawngnak cu lehrulhnak cungah a hngat...
chin_falam.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Ka dir cang — biahalnak a onhmi langhter
chin_falam.open_questions_no_answer_key: Biahalnak a onhmi (lehnak a um lo)
chin_falam.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Zei chawhnak nih dah "dirnak le man sannak" a chuahter? Zeicah dah 1970 kum ah ram uknak lei ah a fak tuk?
chin_falam.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Cai tlawmternak le cozah hmannak pahnih hna nih GDP an forh ṭi. Forhnak dollar khat cio ah zeidah man sannak tam deuh a chuahter? Zeicah?
chin_falam.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: Bank lentlai nih zeitikah dah tlaknak kha duhtein a CHUAHTER lai? (Volcker 1979–82.)
chin_falam.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: A leng thil cai nih caan saupi ah ram chung riantuantu a bawmh maw, asiloah mi vialte caah man a sangter maw? Pahnih hna maw? Khoika ah dah hlonh a hau?
chin_falam.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Hi hnathlak nih cauk chung Keynes hmelchunhnak lawng a hman. Pekmi-lei sum le pai tang ah zei hmelchunhnak dah A LEH lai? MMT tang ah? Klassikal thar (fim tein ruahchannak) tang ah? Vawlei taktak nambat ah Keynes entelnak nih khoikah dah hmelchunhnak a palh a pek?
chin_falam.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Hi phunglam chawhnak nih zeicah hi makro dinhmun a chuahter ti ka fianter khawh.
chin_falam.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Holhchiannak hnathlak — nambat a um lo, langhternak a um lo, lehnak pek a um lo. Nambat hna cu cawnpiaknak caah lawng a si i, makro entelnak taktak A SI LO; lehnak taktak cu tangka uknak lam, a hman rih lomi thazang, ruahchannak, le ramdang sumdawr cungah a hngat. Makro cu an i alnak a si — sum le pai thiam pawl cu hmelchunhnak le a ngan zat kong ah an i lehpiak.
